title: Convo: a conversational programming language
summary: This source introduces Convo, a high-level conversational programming language designed to be interpreted by Generative AI models. Developers write programs in plain natural language as pseudocode, which a Large Language Model then translates into target languages like Python or JavaScript. The approach aims to make programming more accessible and allows programs to be re-ported to newer language versions as models improve. The content includes an example specification and a snake game implemented in Convo.
author: stevenic
